title: copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool
predecessor: M33-T5 shipped 2026-04-16, commit a085dc7 (copilot.* IPC surface + preload bridge; 9 files, +939/-1; 1074 → 1082 unit tests, 0 lint errors, 24 warnings steady, typecheck clean across 6 packages)
goal: Replace T5's copilot.ask stub with a full round-trip through AgenticLoopService.start using employeeId = system-copilot. Response shape `{ runId, threadId }` already matches M31 `IpcExecuteResult.complex_request` — wire-contract stability was locked in T5. Add a new read-only `query_copilot_insights` tool factory (pattern from M31 query_* tools: zod args schema, `{rows, truncated}` envelope, max 50 rows, defensive system-agent/system-copilot isolation filter). Tool registry composition: system-copilot gets M31 read-only set + query_copilot_insights; system-agent continues with its original M31/M32 tool set unchanged. Each system employee runs its own Copilot Conversations thread in the renderer sidenav — M34 UI distinguishes them by actor label + role card color-coding.
acceptance: NEW apps/desktop/src/main/services/agentic-tools-copilot.ts — query_copilot_insights tool factory (level-gated for system-copilot). Mirrors the M31 query_* tool factory pattern structurally. Zod args schema { companyId?: string, category?: CopilotCategory, severity?: CopilotSeverity, includeDismissed?: boolean, limit?: number (1-50, default 20) }. Returns { rows: CopilotInsight[], truncated: boolean }. Max 50 rows per call.

buildCopilotToolRegistry(employee, ...) level-gated composer (analog of buildWriteSideTools) — returns the read-only M31 tool set + query_copilot_insights when employee is the system-copilot; empty addition otherwise. System-agent registry unchanged.

CopilotService (or equivalent) — wraps AgenticLoopService.start with employeeId resolution via employeesRepo.findSystemByRoleId(companyId, 'system-copilot') + thread resolution via a per-company copilot thread ID helper (separate from M31 system-agent thread). Returns { runId, threadId }.

buildCopilotHandlers dep `agenticLoopStart` wired in main/index.ts composition root (T5 left it unset; T6 attaches the real closure). copilot.ask STUB removed — handler now dispatches via the wired closure.

Tool registry composition root — `[...readSideTools, ...buildCopilotToolRegistry(employee, ...)]` when employee.roleId === SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID, matching the M32 T3 write-side registry injection shape.

test-agentic-tools.ts extended with query_copilot_insights canned table (three-tier seam: __ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY__:<json> sentinel → canned per-query table → fallback empty rows). Mirrors the M32 write-side seam pattern.

Unit tests +5 — agentic-tools-copilot.test.ts: (1) happy-path query filters + wire shape, (2) limit clamp to 50 + truncated flag, (3) level-gate blocks non-copilot employees, (4) includeDismissed=true includes dismissed rows in result, (5) copilot-service start wiring resolves system-copilot id and passes through to AgenticLoopService.start. Target 1082 → 1087.
copilot.ask T5 stub tests updated — the 'throws when stub in effect' assertion flipped to 'delegates through the wired agenticLoopStart'; the missing-text validation stays.
Lint clean (0 errors, ≤34 warnings). Typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages.
Atomic commit: feat(m33): M33 T6 — copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool
Ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T6 — commit ledger (<sha>)
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/index.ts — composition root: wire agenticLoopStart into buildCopilotHandlers via copilot-service; compose copilot tool registry in AgenticLoopService.start's tool-registry injector
notes: M31 T3 established the tool-registry injection pattern; M32 T3 extended it with level-gated write-side tools. T6 follows exactly — level-gate on employee.roleId === SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID to add query_copilot_insights, zero change to system-agent's existing M31/M32 tool set.

Thread separation: the M31 system-agent Copilot Conversations thread is created on first command.execute complex_request. The T6 copilot thread is distinct — one per company — so the renderer's Copilot Conversations sidenav shows two system entries: 'system-agent' (M31 M32 agentic loop target) and 'system-copilot' (T6 ask-anything target). Confirm no thread-id collision with the M31 helper.

Wire shape stability gate: copilot.ask MUST return the same `{ runId, threadId }` shape as M31's IpcExecuteResult complex_request branch so M34's sidebar can attach useAgentStepStream with zero branching. T5 locked this in shared-types/src/copilot.ts — verify at the CopilotService boundary.

query_copilot_insights projection: use the T5 toWire() helper pattern to return JSON-safe CopilotInsight rows (not Drizzle CopilotInsightRow). The 50-row cap is hard; `truncated: true` is the signal to narrow via category+severity filters on the next call.

includeDismissed default false — the LLM rarely wants historical dismissals in the prompt, and the T1 listActive method already filters dismissedAt IS NULL. When the flag is true, pass through to a separate repo method OR compose listActive + a dismissed-rows read. Prefer adding a narrow includeDismissed flag to ListActiveFilter if the repo surface grows cleanly; otherwise a sibling listDismissed method on the repo.

copilot.ask stub test flip: the 'throws when the stub is in effect' case in copilot-handlers.test.ts becomes 'delegates through agenticLoopStart' — update BOTH the positive and the negative assertion so the +5 tests land cleanly on 1087.

Estimate: 45-60 min. Tool factory + wiring + 5 tests + composition root is moderate surface area. Heavier than T5 (T5 was pure IPC boilerplate); lighter than T4 (T4 was the analyzer headline). T7 (settings + UI) is next and ~25 min.
